title: Shower Curtain for Bathroom, 100% PEVA Waterproof Anti-Mould Proof Resistant | Quick-Drying | Washable Bathroom Curtain | Includes 12 Pcs Curtain Hooks | 180 x 180 cm (71 x 71 Inch) | Foliage
features: 【Premium Quality Shower Curtain】The waterproof shower curtain is made of superior PEVA fabric. This shower curtain can repel water and promote the formation of water droplets, causing water to roll off the surface quickly. That makes it able to withstand harsh and humid environments.

【Anti Mould and Waterproof】Our PEVA shower curtains are mould proof resistant,water repellent, soft, breathable, skin-friendly, non-toxic and non-fading, durable. Designed to maintain a fresh and clean environment.
【Comprehensive Coverage】Our bath curtains provide full coverage for your shower or bathtub. These are ideal for maintaining privacy and keeping water in its place.
【Easy to Install and Clean】The PEVA shower curtain can be hand and machine wash in cold water. Do not use bleach and air dry them in a well ventilated area. They will dry quickly.

【Suitable Multiple Sites】 Whether you are looking for bathroom curtains for your home or hotel or resort bathrooms, these Luxurious and ready-to-hang shower curtains are a great choice to make for residential as well as commercial establishments.
description: Product Description PEVA Shower Curtain are designed for your bathroom to improve the overall look and provide privacy. Bathroom Curtain Note: 1. Due to the light and screen difference, the item's color may be slightly different from the pictures. 2. Please allow 1-2 cm differences due to manual measurement. Care Instruction Machine washable. Do not bleach. Do not dry clean. low temperature. Specification: -- Material: 100% PEVA -- Dimension: 5.9 x 5.9 feet/5.9 x 6.5 feet -- Color: Foliage -- Package: 1 * shower curtain, 12 * plastic hooks Rust-Resistant Metal Grommets Heavy Duty Fabric Water Repellent
